name: Jakarta Indonesia Korean School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Bina Marga No.24, Ceger, Cipayung, Jakarta Timur, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say JIKS is the obvious choice for Korean families in Jakarta - it is the largest overseas Korean school in the region.
paragraphs: Parents say JIKS is the obvious choice for Korean families in Jakarta - it is the largest overseas Korean school in the region.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$6.2K – US$19K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: East Jakarta campus, Classrooms, Science laboratories, Sports facilities, Auditorium.

metaDescription: Jakarta Indonesia Korean School (East Jakarta). Parents say JIKS is the obvious choice for Korean families in Jakarta - it is the largest overseas Korean school in the region.…
